context.goal: Switch to the highlight annotation tool from the toolbar after applying the text property change.
context.cues: The document canvas is visible again without the Text properties dialog. The slide remains on page 6/15, showing the modified first bullet line, and the top toolbar contains the Highlight button.

anchors.locator: top toolbar button labeled 'Highlight' with yellow pen icon

procedure.expect: The Highlight tool is selected from the toolbar while the same slide remains visible.
